## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO strategy for Q2 priority accounts, focusing on key verticals and content optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting focus to 4 verticals: grocery, fashion, footwear, beauty, home improvement](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Consolidating backlinks for higher traffic (5000+ hits) and updated content](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Implementing SEO-optimized keywords across content, sales enablement, and SM](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Auditing existing beauty/fashion articles (40-50) to inform future content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

## Topics

### Vertical-Focused Strategy

  - [Concentrating efforts on 4 key verticals: grocery, fashion, footwear, beauty, home improvement](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Creating more blogs and content specifically tailored to these verticals](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Identifying and liberally using video e-commerce-specific keywords across all content](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Consolidating backlinks to generate higher traffic (5000+ hits vs. 50) and maintain updated content](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)

### SEO Optimization Tactics

  - [Sprinkling identified keywords across SM, SEO content, and sales enablement materials](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Website changes to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Creating quality backlinks to generate substantial, recognizable traffic](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Future phase: associating backlinks with specific content (e.g., fashion playbook) for better SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Content Calendar and Publishing Strategy

  - [Integrating SEO articles into the larger content calendar](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Weekly focus on specific categories, publishing targeted articles](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Tracking performance and adjusting strategy based on results](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

### Existing Content Audit

  - [40-50 articles published across beauty and fashion industries](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Prateek to conduct audit on rankings, clicks, impressions, and topics for tomorrow's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Results will inform strategy for new industry-specific topics and content](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

### Footwear Industry Content Ideas

  - [Broad topics: industry statistics, trends, AI usage in footwear brands](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Product-relevant topics: digital showrooms, video marketing benefits, e-commerce personalization](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Conversion-focused content: increasing average order value, reducing bounce rates](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Brand Integration in Content

  - [Emphasis on showcasing Firework directly or indirectly in articles](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Mentioning Firework keyword and including phrases like "Firework helping clients like Nike"](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Incorporating current customer examples and recent deals in content](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Active Footwear Clients and Use Cases

  - [DSW: Implemented shoppable videos on homepage and product detail pages](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [JD Sports (parent company) and Finish Line (sub-brand): Active partners](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Potential upcoming launches: Adidas, Nike (not to be discussed publicly yet)](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to audit beauty and fashion commerce articles, present performance in tomorrow's call](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Create 20-30 articles on fashion brands over next couple of weeks, focusing on Firework relevance](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Ritesh to review Prateek's proposed 20-25 footwear topics](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Prateek to incorporate DSW and Finish Line use cases in content, using provided links/screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Team to reconvene tomorrow to discuss beauty/fashion article performance and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/LzVmH5BZxz71LGjMB2bRiBZDwVoeJnd7?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
